name: Headline
description: Bold headline + product hero. Tests text rendering.

name: Offer / Promotion
description: Split background with offer text + product centered.

name: Testimonial
description: Real environment + quote overlay + product.

name: Features / Benefits
description: Diagram-style with callout boxes and connecting lines.

name: Bullet Points
description: Split: product left, benefits list right.

name: Social Proof
description: Member count + review card + press logos.

name: Us vs Them
description: Side-by-side comparison. Photography quality gap IS the argument.

name: Before & After (UGC)
description: Mirror selfie transformation. Must look real.

name: Negative Marketing
description: Fake bad review that's actually a rave. Scroll-stopper.

name: Press / Editorial
description: Authority play. Vogue back-page energy.

name: Pull-Quote Review
description: Emotional quote + review card on color block.

name: Lifestyle + Product Array
description: Action hero shot + fanned product lineup.

name: Stat Surround
description: Product center with stat callouts and arrows.

name: Bundle Showcase
description: Open box with multiple products + benefit bar.

name: Social Comment
description: Screenshotted comment + product. Looks organic.

name: Curiosity Gap
description: Provocative headline forces double-take. Bait-and-switch.

name: Verified Review Card
description: Mimics real review platform UI with verified badge.

name: Stat Callout (Lifestyle)
description: Lifestyle flatlay + stat arrows pointing to product.

name: Highlighted Review
description: Long review with highlighter on key phrases.

name: Advertorial / Editorial
description: Looks like news post, not ad. Editorial framing.

name: Bold Statement
description: Provocative line + hot gradient + product. Copy IS the ad.

name: Flavor Story / Tastes Like
description: Food scene background + product placement + stats.

name: Long-Form Manifesto
description: Copy-dominant. Text is the entire creative.

name: Product + Comment
description: Product hero + Facebook comment card below.

name: Color Split Compare
description: Vibrant brand side vs muted competitor side.

name: Stat-Driven Lifestyle
description: Lifestyle photo + stat headline overlay.

name: Benefit Checklist
description: Split: product display left, checklist right.

name: Arrow Callout
description: Hand holding product + curved arrows to benefits.

name: UGC + Viral Post
description: Casual selfie + Reddit/Twitter post overlay.

name: Hero + Icon Bar
description: Bold statement headline + product + benefit icons.

name: Comparison Grid
description: Structured table. Meme-format comparison.

name: UGC Story Bubbles
description: iPhone photo + Instagram Story text bubbles.

name: Faux Press Article
description: Looks like real news article screenshot.

name: Faux iPhone Notes
description: iPhone Notes app screenshot with benefits.

name: Hero + Stat Bar
description: Superlative claim + product + stat bar bottom.

name: Whiteboard Before/After
description: Whiteboard drawings + hand holding product.

name: Hero + Promo Burst
description: Bold statement + starburst discount badge + product.

name: Founder Story
description: Personal letter from founder + headshot.

name: Ingredient Showcase
description: Product center + ingredient photos radiating out.

name: Countdown / Urgency
description: Timer + limited stock + bold offer.
